overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a pink jacket walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses open plazas, crosses streets under massive concrete overpasses, walks through narrow covered walkways with vending machines, and finally enters a red-lit abandoned interior space. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, graffiti, and mixed natural and artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking away from the Willing Management Services building toward an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: modern building with illuminated signage reading 'WILLING MANAGEMENT SERVICES'
tropical palm tree in planter on the plaza
large digital billboard with motorcycle advertisement
massive elevated highway structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through an open urban plaza with palm trees and modern commercial buildings. The Willing Management Services building is prominent on the right with a large digital advertisement. The character heads toward a street intersection dominated by a massive concrete overpass structure in the distance.

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto striped crosswalk under the overpass
gray sedan drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street with red and yellow striped crosswalk markings while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: gray sedan driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with red and yellow striped markings
massive support columns for the elevated highway above
multi-story parking garage with green facade and exposed red structural beams

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide street under massive concrete overpass pillars. The crosswalk features distinctive red and yellow stripes. A gray sedan drives past as the character moves through the intersection. The green parking structure becomes visible on the left while the sky is mostly blocked by the elevated highway above.

events.description: finishes crossing street and enters covered sidewalk area under the overpass
turns left to follow the path deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass with other pedestrians, passing graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: woman in black pants walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
multi-story building with large digital advertisement displays

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath the massive overpass. The area features graffiti-covered walls on the right and commercial buildings with digital billboards. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction as the camera follows the character deeper into the shaded urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered walkway with vending machines and shops

events.description: enters narrower covered walkway with vending machines lining the right wall
lighting becomes progressively darker and more blue-toned as the walkway deepens

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage passing vending machines and digital advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: row of illuminated vending machines with various products
concrete ceiling of the covered pedestrian passage with fluorescent lighting
glowing digital advertisement screens mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered walkway beneath the urban infrastructure. The passage is lined with illuminated vending machines and digital billboards on the right side. The lighting shifts to artificial blue tones as the character progresses deeper into the enclosed corridor, with concrete pillars visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned interior space with red neon lighting

events.description: enters red-lit abandoned room with arcade machines and scattered debris
dramatic shift to intense red neon lighting throughout the space

agents.ego_description: entering a derelict interior space with red lighting, exploring the abandoned area with arcade machines

entered.detail: intense red neon tube lighting running along the ceiling
abandoned arcade game cabinets with blue and white coloring
scattered trash, wooden pallets, and abandoned items covering the floor
stacked wooden crates and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dramatic red-lit abandoned interior space, transitioning from the blue-toned walkway to an intense neon-red environment. The room contains abandoned arcade machines, scattered debris, and wooden crates. The space appears derelict with graffiti on the walls and trash covering the concrete floor, creating a stark cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright urban plaza that gradually descends into a dark, derelict interior. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and the digital advertisements of the Willing Management Services building toward a distant concrete overpass. As the character crosses a red-and-yellow striped street, the open sky is replaced by the oppressive weight of massive highway pillars and a passing gray sedan. The scene then shifts into a shaded urban corridor of graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards before narrowing into a blue-lit walkway lined with glowing vending machines. Finally, the environment transitions from these artificial blue tones into a stark, neon-red abandoned space filled with derelict arcade machines, wooden crates, and scattered debris.
